creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #54)
This is new to me. I was quite sure that you cannot load a module if it's already compiled into the kernel. The realtek driver Readme.txt in fact says that you have to build a new kernel without the re driver, to be able to use their driver as a module. Since when this is possible, if really is? Do you have any source code reference for that?
